data.title: Ribbon cutting for new affordable housing development in Fayetteville, Arkansas with 89 units and $850,000 AHP grant.
data.description: In Fayetteville, Arkansas, a ceremonial ribbon cutting for Cobblestone Community Farm, an 89-unit affordable housing development offering single-family homes, duplexes, and triplexes for rent, will be attended by representatives from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Arvest Bank. FHLB Dallas provided an $850,000 Affordable Housing Program (AHP) grant through Arvest Bank for construction costs. Media presence is welcomed at the event.

data.title: Stock futures fluctuate before crucial payrolls report. Expecting just 75,000 new jobs in August. Fed likely to cut rates. Indices: Dow -0.02%, S&P 500 0.22%, Nasdaq 100 0.48%. SPY up 0.22% at $650.56, QQQ up 0.53% to $578.28.Indices closed positively on Thursday. Utilities stocks fell. SAIC stock dropped 6%. Economic reports show signs of weak labor market. ISM services PMI at 52 in August. U.S. trade deficit at $78.3 billion in July. Dow rose 0.77% to 45,621.29,S&P 500 rose 0.83% to 6,502.08. Nasdaq Composite advanced 0.98% to 21,707.69.
data.description: U.S. stock futures were volatile on Friday after a positive market performance. Economists are anticipating a weak non-farm payrolls report, with expectations of 75,000 new jobs in August. The 10-year Treasury bond yield was at 4.16% and the two-year bond at 3.59%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool predicts a 99.4% chance of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates. The futures changes were as follows: Dow Jones -0.02%, S&P 500 0.22%, Nasdaq 100 0.48%, Russell 2000 0.14%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose in premarket. Major sectors closed positively on the S&P 500, with a focus on labor market cooling in August. Economic reports indicated a need for a rate cut. The Dow Jones index closed 350 points higher at 45,621.29, S&P 500 index rose to 6,502.08, and Nasdaq Composite advanced to 21,707.69. Key numbers include an increase in ISM services PMI to 52 in August and a rise in the U.S. trade deficit to $78.3 billion in July. Science Applications International Corp. (NASDAQ: SAIC) stock fell by 6% post its earnings report. Initial jobless claims rose by 8,000 to 237,000 in the last week of August.

data.title: NIQ introduces AI Shopper Voice on GfKnewron® Consumer platform, offers consumer verbatim comments.
data.description: NielsenIQ (NYSE: NIQ) in Nuremberg, Germany, has unveiled updates to its GfKnewron® Consumer platform, which now incorporates AI-Powered Shopper Voice. This enhancement provides insights into consumer sentiments through direct verbatim comments from shoppers regarding brands, retail partners, and competitors. The platform now features the largest recent buyer survey in Tech & Durables, offering comprehensive market, consumer, and brand intelligence. Through this advancement, NIQ aims to offer a more insightful and in-depth understanding of shopper perspectives.

data.title: BTC surpasses $112K, analysts predict a major move. Relief bounce clears shorts, potential spike from US jobs data.
data.description: A recent increase in Bitcoin's value has pushed it above $112,000, leading to the liquidation of short positions. Analysts suggest that Bitcoin's price may receive a further boost from the upcoming US jobs report.

data.title: Pelagos Data Centres plans 250MW facility near Port of Gibraltar by 2033, announced by Chief Minister Hon. Fabian Picardo.
data.description: In Gibraltar, a new data center is set to be constructed by Pelagos Data Centers, with plans to provide a maximum capacity of 250 megawatts (MW) by 2033. The announcement was made during a launch event hosted at the offices of the Chief Minister of Gibraltar, Hon. Fabian Picardo.

data.title: Biodesix CFO to attend BIG9 Conference for 1x1 investor meetings on Sept 11, 2025.
data.description: In Louisville, Colorado on September 5, 2025, Biodesix, Inc. (Nasdaq: BDSX), a prominent diagnostic solutions firm, revealed that Robin Cowie, the Chief Financial Officer, will be conducting individual investor meetings at Lake Street Capital Markets’ 9th Annual Best Ideas Growth (BIG9) Conference on September 11, 2025.

data.title: Public workers in Newfoundland & Labrador gather against privatization crisis hosted by CUPE in Corner Brook conference.
data.description: In Corner Brook, NL, public sector workers are convening at a three-day conference hosted by the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) at Greenwood Inn & Suites. The gathering aims to address the growing concern over privatization of public services in Newfoundland & Labrador. Workers, including activists and experts, will share insights and strategies to counter the rise of public-private partnerships (P3s) in nearly every sector. This event serves as a platform for exchanging ideas and building defenses against privatization in the region.

data.title: Trump's Fed pick Miran defends independence, promises autonomy despite Trump pressure. Dems caution appointment could harm central bank; Miran faces 2.5 hours of Senate questioning. Fed meeting scheduled for Sept 16-17.
data.description: During a Senate Banking Committee hearing, President Donald Trump's nominee for the Federal Reserve, Stephen Miran, emphasized his commitment to independence as Democrats expressed concerns that his appointment could impact the central bank's autonomy in monetary policy decisions. Miran, the current chair of Trump's Council of Economic Advisors, reassured senators during the two-hour and 20-minute session that he would prioritize making interest-rate decisions without succumbing to presidential influence. The discussion took place ahead of the Fed's upcoming meeting on September 16-17. Miran stated, "I'm open to considering various perspectives to challenge and evaluate my own views." The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: At IFA 2025, Thunderobot's gaming gear impresses with over 1000 daily visitors, drawing global attention.
data.description: In Berlin on September 5, 2025, during the IFA event, Thunderobot, a renowned brand in professional esports hardware and ecosystem solutions, unveiled top-notch gaming hardware that became a standout attraction. Their booth at Hall 6.2-173 has been frequented by more than 1,000 professional visitors per day since its opening, capturing considerable interest from global media, distributors, and gaming fans. The exhibition presented key features and innovations in the gaming industry.

data.title: Qualcomm & BMW introduce AI-enabled Snapdragon Ride system for automated driving, in BMW iX3. Validated in 60 countries, aiming for 100+ by 2026.
data.description: In San Diego, NASDAQ-listed QCOM has introduced the AI-powered Snapdragon Ride Pilot Automated Driving System at the IAA Mobility 2025 event in collaboration with the all-new BMW iX3. This system is driven by Snapdragon Ride system-on-chips and a newly created automated driving software stack. Validation for the system has been conducted across 60 countries globally, with plans to make it accessible in over 100 countries by 2026. The platform is scalable, allowing for the deployment of cost-effective single camera active safety systems, with the capability to expand to a multi-camera setup.
